text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: It's the day of the Hakodate Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru aims to earn a<n>winner's star
that rivals the<n>star-shaped grounds of Goryokaku
Fort.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She enthusiastically heads off to the<n>track to make
her mark.
